title.zh: 用 AI 协作 & 做产品的几个发力点
title.en: Collaborating with AI & where to push on a product

body.zh: 一、怎么用 AI（用法层面）
body.en: I. How to use AI (at the usage level)

body.zh: 别用聊天框，用 agent：用 Claude Code、Codex 这类 agent 形式跟 AI 协作，而不是简单的对话框。
body.en: Don't use the chat box — use agents: collaborate with AI through tools like Claude Code or Codex, not a simple chat box.

body.zh: 定期复盘沉淀：每周把一周的对话拿给 AI 复盘，让它帮你提炼——哪些是重复劳动（可固化）、哪些可以改进。把零散对话变成可积累的知识资产。
body.en: Review regularly: each week, hand a week of conversations to the AI to distill — what's repetitive (worth codifying), what can improve. Turn scattered chats into a compounding knowledge asset.

body.zh: 二、做软件的三个发力点（每一个都能做到极致）
body.en: II. Three places to push when building software (take each to the extreme)

body.zh: 1. 界面（Interface）——需要审美（自评不擅长，可暂时绕开）
body.en: 1. Interface — needs taste (not your strength for now, can skip)

body.zh: 2. 工作流（Workflow）——做事的方法论、流程
body.en: 2. Workflow — the methodology and process of getting things done

body.zh: 3. 数据 / 知识库（Data）——积累的数据本身就是壁垒
body.en: 3. Data / knowledge base — the accumulated data is itself a moat

body.zh: 三者任一做到极致，就是个好产品。
body.en: Take any one to the extreme and you have a good product.

body.zh: 三、选方向的两条黄金标准
body.en: III. Two golden criteria for choosing a direction

body.zh: 1. 找你热爱的事：干三天三夜也不觉得累的那件事。
body.en: 1. Find what you love: the thing you can do for three days straight without tiring.

body.zh: 2. 找你的不对称优势：你做起来很容易、别人做起来很难的事。
body.en: 2. Find your asymmetric advantage: easy for you, hard for others.

body.zh: 两条交叉的地方，就是你该投入的方向。
body.en: Where the two cross is where you should invest.

body.zh: 已经把方法论打包成了 skill——这就是你的「工作流」资产。
body.en: You've packaged your methodology into a skill — that's your 'workflow' asset.

body.zh: 问题：暂时无法变现。原因有二：a. 资料给别人就能直接复制，没有壁垒；b. 方法论不一定适配别人，通用性存疑。
body.en: Problem: it can't be monetized yet. Two reasons: a. the material can be copied once shared — no moat; b. the methodology may not fit others — generality is uncertain.

body.zh: 这个卡点正好对应三发力点——你现在强的是「工作流」，弱的是「界面」和「数据」。光卖工作流（skill 文件）容易被复制；但如果把工作流包进一个界面 / 服务里，或让它在使用中沉淀出只属于你的数据，复制就难了。变现的钥匙可能不在「卖方法论」，而在「把方法论变成别人离不开的产品形态」。
body.en: This bottleneck maps onto the three push-points — you're strong at 'workflow,' weak at 'interface' and 'data.' Selling workflow alone (skill files) is easy to copy; but wrap it inside an interface/service, or let it accumulate data that's uniquely yours through use, and copying gets hard. The key to monetizing may not be 'selling the methodology,' but 'turning it into a product people can't live without.'
